get.description: Returns an HTML page with a form to set a new password, or an HTML error message if the token is missing or invalid.

parameters.description: Opaque reset token from the email link
parameters.name: token

200.description: text/html — form page or error page

post.description: Accepts JSON (`application/json`) for API clients, or `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` from the HTML form in the email flow. On success, returns JSON for JSON requests and HTML for form requests. Errors may be JSON or HTML accordingly.

200.description: JSON body when the client sends JSON. For `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` (browser form from the email), response is `text/html` with a success page instead.

parameters.description: Workspace ID (omit for admin: list all boards)
parameters.name: workspace_id

parameters.description: Board ID (omit for admin: list all tasks)
parameters.name: board_id
